# Automatic tests

After completing all the steps in the project, automatic tests will become available to you. Tests are run on each commit - once all tasks in the Hexlet interface are completed, make a commit, and the tests will run automatically.

The hexlet-check.yml file is responsible for running these tests - do not delete this file, edit it, or rename the repository.

[![Quality Gate Status](https://sonarcloud.io/api/project_badges/measure?project=darkusgamers3_frontend-project-44&metric=alert_status)](https://sonarcloud.io/summary/new_code?id=darkusgamers3_frontend-project-44)


Команды для запуска игр:

node bin/brain-games.js (Приветствие)
node bin/brain-even.js (Игра четно/нечетно)
node bin/brain-calc.js (Игра калькулятор)
node bin/brain-gcd.js  (Игра НОД)
node bin/brain-progression.js (Игра арифметическая прогрессия )
node bin/brain-prime.js (Игра простые числа)
